channel.title: Game Changer Animated
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer Animated on Dropout.tv

item.title: Name That Bird
item.description:
Can Brennan handle a simple quiz naming birds? Animated by Trevor Dedekind and Cassie Robinson.

Duration: 02:48

Tags: Game Changer Animated, animation, game shows, challenges, competitions, improv, surprises, mad skills, unscripted, sam reich, brennan lee mulligan, katie marovitch, carolyn page, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, cassie robinson
